zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Rice於1627年3月9日之前出生在英國賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德時，她的父親Deacon Edmund Rice34歲，母親Thomasine Frost26歲。她於1646年之前與Hugh Drury在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1675年4月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Rice于1627年3月9日之前出生在英国賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德时，她的父亲Deacon Edmund Rice34岁，母亲Thomasine Frost26岁。她于1646年之前与Hugh Drury在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1675年4月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓金斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized pronunciation of one of the most common Welsh personal names, Rhys, from a form originally meaning ‘rash, impetuous’, also spelled Rys and Re(e)s. See also Reese , with which it is interchangeable as a result of different Anglicized forms of the Welsh vowel y, and also compare Preece and Price . Initial R- in Welsh is voiceless and often spelled Rh-, but in English R- is voiced as in the Anglicized surnames Rees and Rice. Welsh y is a short back vowel /ɪ/. In the medieval period the English approximation of this vowel was either /i/ or /e/, lengthened to /i:/ and /e:/. Subsequent sound changes in English produced the alternative pronunciations represented in Rees, Preece and Rice, Price. The name has also been established in Ireland from an early date.

English: either a topographic name for someone who lived in or near a thicket (Middle English ris, rice, ris, from Old English hrīs, Old Norse hrís), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place called with this word, such as Rise (East Yorkshire).

English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English Rys(e) and Re(e)s which when without a preposition could derive from one or other of several Old French and Middle English words, including Anglo-Norman French ris ‘laughter, smile’, Middle English ris, res ‘stem, stalk’, in origin the same word as in 2 above, and Middle English ris, rise, rice, res, Old French ris, riz ‘rice’, perhaps a nickname for a rice dealer or a cook.

variants.name: Reese
meanings: North German and Dutch (De Reese): nickname for a very big man, from Middle Low German, Middle Dutch rese ‘giant’.
German: habitational name from any of the places called Rees or Reese, in Rhineland and Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

variants.name: Ryce
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Rice  .

variants.name: Rise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Aase, Lief, Sven.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of over twenty farmsteads named Rise, from Old Norse hrís ‘brushwood’. The name also occurs in Sweden and Denmark.

variants.name: Wrice
meanings: Probably Welsh or English: variant of   Rice  .

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Rice was born before 9 March 1627, in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Deacon Edmund Rice, was 34 and her mother, Thomasine Frost, was 26. She married Hugh Drury before 1646, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 April 1675, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Rice est née avant 9 mars 1627, à Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Deacon Edmund Rice, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Frost, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Drury avant 1646, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1675, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Sie hat vor 1646 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hugh Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. April 1675 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Rice è nata il prima del 9 marzo 1627 nel Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Deacon Edmund Rice, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Frost, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Drury prima del 1646, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 aprile 1675, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Riceが1627年3月9日以前にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステドで生まれた時，父Deacon Edmund Riceは34歳，母Thomasine Frostは26歳であった。1646年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでHugh Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1675年4月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンキングズ チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 말를버루
ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Rice(이)가 1627년 3월 9일 이전 영국 허트퍼드실르 버카스테드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Deacon Edmund Rice(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Frost(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1646년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Hugh Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 4월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 킨그스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Rice nasceu antes 9 de março de 1627, em Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Deacon Edmund Rice, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Frost, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Drury antes 1646, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1675, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Rice родилась перед 9 марта 1627 г. в местности бирхамстед, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Deacon Edmund Rice было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Frost, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Drury перед 1646 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 апреля 1675 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности кингс чапел, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lydia Rice nació antes de 9 de marzo de 1627, en Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Deacon Edmund Rice, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Thomasine Frost, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hugh Drury antes de 1646, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 5 de abril de 1675, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

th.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: ซูดบูรี, มิดดเลเซกซ์, มาสซาชูเซตตสเบย์คโลอนี, บริทิชคโลเนิยลอาเมอริก้า
th.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: บอสตัน, ซูฟฟอลค, มาสซาชูเซตตสเบย์คโลอนี, บริทิชคโลเนิยลอาเมอริก้า
th.Kings Chapel, Boston, Suffolk, Massachus: คิงสชาปีล, บอสตัน, ซูฟฟอลค, มาสซาชูเซตตสเบย์คโลอนี, บริทิชคโลเนิยลอาเมอริก้า
th.Saint Mary's Church, Bury Saint Edmunds,: สตมารี'สเชิร์ช, เบูรีสตเอดมันด์, ซูฟฟอลค, อังกฤษ, สหราชอาณาจักร
th.Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England: เบอร์คแฮมสเตอด, เฮอร์ฟอรดชิเร, เองกแลนด
th.Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: มาร์ลบอรู, มิดดเลเซกซ์, มาสซาชูเซตตสเบย์คโลอนี, บริทิชคโลเนิยลอาเมอริก้า
